title: Moonstone ：Blood
description: A branch of Moonstone that added blood demon items to the game
body:
_Pursuing and using a large number of Blood Demon items is a dream in the player's imagination,isn't it？_

## be careful:

This module may not be compatible with lighting/shaders, and if installed, it may cause some entities to disappear‘

## introduce

This mod has added a large number of dark, deep red items that can be found in various loot items or created by players

As shown in the picture：

![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f8ff3c8f8e5c471fda1037a5c98baecc98ca257.png)

There is also a custom progress bar for the module

![tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b20f0e6e07b6cf3b1724dc5768e7c17e562c54aa.png)
